# Luca Berton — AI & Cloud Advisor

> Luca Berton is an independent AI and Cloud Advisor based in Europe. He helps enterprises design GPU inference platforms, Kubernetes architectures, automation strategies, and AI governance frameworks. Author of 8+ technical books on Ansible and Kubernetes. Speaker at KubeCon, Red Hat Summit, and cloud-native conferences.

Luca specializes in:
- AI infrastructure on Kubernetes (GPU scheduling, distributed inference, MLOps)
- Platform engineering and developer experience
- Enterprise automation with Ansible and Terraform
- Cloud-native architecture and migration strategies
- Security hardening and compliance (EU AI Act, CRA, NIS2, DORA)

## Services

- [AI Integration & Strategy](https://lucaberton.com/services/ai-integration/): AI readiness assessments, GPU infrastructure design, LLM deployment architecture, model governance frameworks
- [Kubernetes Workshops](https://lucaberton.com/services/kubernetes-workshops/): Hands-on K8s training, multi-tenant GPU clusters, operator development, production hardening
- [Automation Strategy](https://lucaberton.com/services/automation-strategy/): Ansible automation at scale, IaC with Terraform, CI/CD pipeline design, GitOps implementation
- [Cloud Infrastructure](https://lucaberton.com/services/cloud-infrastructure/): Multi-cloud architecture, Kubernetes migration, cost optimization, disaster recovery
- [Performance Optimization](https://lucaberton.com/services/performance-optimization/): Infrastructure performance audits, GPU utilization, observability stack design, SLO-driven operations

## Books

- [Kubernetes Recipes](https://lucaberton.com/kubernetes-recipes/): Practical cookbook for Kubernetes operations and troubleshooting
- [Practical RHEL AI](https://lucaberton.com/practical-rhel-ai/): Hands-on guide to Red Hat Enterprise Linux AI with InstructLab
- [Ansible for Real-Life Automation](https://lucaberton.com/books/): Published by Packt, comprehensive Ansible guide
- [Ansible Pilot](https://lucaberton.com/books/): Step-by-step Ansible automation

- [About](https://lucaberton.com/about/): Background, certifications, and professional experience
- [Courses](https://lucaberton.com/courses/): Online courses on Ansible, Kubernetes, DevOps, and cloud platforms
- [Conference Speaking](https://lucaberton.com/conferences/): Past and upcoming speaking engagements
- [KubeCon Europe 2026](https://lucaberton.com/kubecon/): Talk on multi-tenant GPUs on bare metal, slides, and booking
- [GPU Cost Calculator](https://lucaberton.com/gpu-cost-calculator/): Compare cloud vs on-premises GPU infrastructure costs
- [Contact](https://lucaberton.com/contact/): Get in touch or book a consultation
- [Blog](https://lucaberton.com/blog/): 840+ technical articles on AI, Kubernetes, Ansible, DevOps, and cloud

## Featured Articles — AI & GPU Infrastructure

- [Enterprise AI Governance Framework](https://lucaberton.com/blog/enterprise-ai-governance-framework-2026/): Model registry, risk tiers, EU AI Act compliance, accountability matrix
- [On-Premises LLM Deployment for Regulated Industries](https://lucaberton.com/blog/enterprise-llm-deployment-patterns-on-premises-2026/): Air-gapped Kubernetes, vLLM, cost breakeven analysis
- [NVIDIA NIM Multinode Inference](https://lucaberton.com/blog/nvidia-nim-multinode-inference-large-models-2026/): Serving 400B+ models across GPU nodes with tensor and pipeline parallelism
- [NVIDIA Run:ai Distributed Inference](https://lucaberton.com/blog/nvidia-run-ai-distributed-inference-platform-2026/): Platform guide for large model serving with Run:ai
- [NVIDIA GPU Operator on Kubernetes](https://lucaberton.com/blog/nvidia-gpu-operator-kubernetes-ai-ml/): Install and configure GPU operator for AI/ML workloads
- [The Inference Gold Rush](https://lucaberton.com/blog/inference-gold-rush-ai-startups-kubernetes-2026/): Market analysis of AI inference infrastructure
- [FinOps for AI GPU Workloads](https://lucaberton.com/blog/finops-ai-gpu-workloads-cost-optimization-2026/): GPU cost optimization strategies
- [RHEL AI Tutorial](https://lucaberton.com/blog/rhel-ai-tutorial-complete-beginners-guide-2026/): Complete beginner's guide to Red Hat Enterprise Linux AI
- [InstructLab Fine-Tuning Guide](https://lucaberton.com/blog/instructlab-fine-tuning-guide-rhel-ai-2026/): Fine-tune models with InstructLab on RHEL AI
- [MLOps Pipeline on Kubernetes](https://lucaberton.com/blog/mlops-pipeline-kubernetes-enterprise-2026/): Kubeflow, MLflow, feature stores, automated retraining

## Featured Articles — Kubernetes & Platform Engineering

- [Kubernetes Multi-Cluster Management](https://lucaberton.com/blog/kubernetes-multi-cluster-management-enterprise-2026/): ArgoCD ApplicationSets, Cluster API, Rancher Fleet
- [Kubernetes Security Hardening Checklist](https://lucaberton.com/blog/enterprise-kubernetes-security-hardening-checklist-2026/): 50-point audit checklist with CIS benchmarks
- [Enterprise GitOps Maturity Model](https://lucaberton.com/blog/enterprise-gitops-maturity-model-2026/): 5 levels from manual deploys to full automation
- [Cloud Migration to Kubernetes](https://lucaberton.com/blog/enterprise-cloud-migration-kubernetes-strategy-2026/): 6R framework, readiness scoring, migration phases
- [Enterprise Observability Stack](https://lucaberton.com/blog/enterprise-observability-stack-kubernetes-2026/): Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Tempo, OpenTelemetry
- [API Gateway Comparison](https://lucaberton.com/blog/enterprise-api-gateway-kubernetes-comparison-2026/): Kong vs Envoy vs APISIX vs Traefik
- [Disaster Recovery for Kubernetes](https://lucaberton.com/blog/enterprise-disaster-recovery-kubernetes-2026/): Active-active, Velero, runbook templates
- [Backstage Developer Portal](https://lucaberton.com/blog/backstage-internal-developer-portal-setup-guide-2026/): Internal developer portal setup
- [Platform Engineering Metrics](https://lucaberton.com/blog/platform-engineering-metrics-measure-success-2026/): DORA metrics, developer experience KPIs
